name: Image to Design Specification
description: Extract component architecture, hierarchy, visual design rules, and color palettes from a UI screenshot to build a DESIGN.md design specification.
triggers: convert image to ui ux design

inputs.name: image_path
inputs.description: Path to the local screenshot or UI image file.

inputs.name: brand_context
inputs.description: Optional guidelines representing the target brand voice and colors.

outputs.name: design_md
outputs.description: DESIGN.md file content detailing structure, components, styles, and guidelines.

outputs.name: a11y_notes
outputs.description: Accessibility contrast and hierarchy assessment results.

gates.rule: Ensure input is an image file path and matches the scope of design specification extraction.
Ensure findings pass design-system verification and visual hierarchy is structured.

steps.description: Analyze the visual screenshot to partition areas into headers, sidebars, main contents, grids, and separate component lists.
Identify colors, primary/secondary styles, typography weights, size scales, borders, shadow styles, and spacing metrics.
Synthesize findings and compile them into a structured, production-grade DESIGN.md document.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write generated DESIGN.md to target location.

verification.method: Verify DESIGN.md contains sections for color system, typography, components, and layout.
Verify spacing, HSL tailormade colors, and sizes are quantified.

success_criteria: Components hierarchy is completely mapped from the image.
Styles, colors, and layout are extracted and formatted as reusable design tokens.
The output matches premium visual guidelines.

rollback.when: If the design tokens cannot be extracted cleanly, stop without saving mock data.
